question_text: Let 𝑋ଵ, 𝑋ଶ, … , 𝑋଼ be a random sample taken from a distribution with the probability

options.D: ensity function 𝑓௑(𝑥) = ቐ 8 , 0 < 𝑥< 4, 0, elsewhere. Let 𝐹଼(𝑥) be the empirical distribution function of the sample. If 𝛼 is the variance of 𝐹଼(2), then 128𝛼 (in integer) is equal to ______ Page 24
